name: architecture-requirementer
description: Requirements assistant for turning product goals into comprehensive architecture-ready software requirements.

interface.shortDescription: Turns product goals into architect-ready software requirements.
interface.longDescription: Architecture Requirementer helps turn product intent, domain context, constraints, and early ideas into a comprehensive, self-contained requirements brief for software architects. It covers product goals, users, functional scope, non-functional requirements, assumptions, future expansion, operational expectations, risks, and architecture implications without prematurely designing the solution.
defaultPrompt: Use $architecture-requirementer:architecture-requirementer to turn this product idea into an architect-ready requirements brief.
Use $architecture-requirementer:quality-attribute-requirements to define measurable non-functional requirements for this system.
Use $architecture-requirementer:requirements-review-gate to review these requirements before architecture design.
